package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for single_impl_interface: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repository-local interfaces with one obvious implementation and a very small consumer surface.
type CaseSingleImplInterfaceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSingleImplInterfaceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSingleImplInterfaceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSingleImplInterfaceModel
}

type CaseSingleImplInterfaceService struct {
    repo *CaseSingleImplInterfaceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSingleImplInterfaceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSingleImplInterface(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSingleImplInterfaceDTO) error {
    focus := "single_impl_interface"
    _ = focus
    type CaseSingleImplInterfaceRunner interface { Run(context.Context) error }
    _ = (*CaseSingleImplInterfaceRunner)(nil)
    single_impl_interface_negative := map[string]int{"single": 1, "impl": 2, "interface": 3}
    single_impl_interface_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    single_negative_0 := single_impl_interface_negative["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_negative_0
    impl_negative_1 := single_impl_interface_negative["impl"] + len(input)
    _ = impl_negative_1
    interface_negative_2 := single_impl_interface_negative["interface"] + len(input)
    _ = interface_negative_2
    return nil
}
